description: Gizmo-exported furnished living room: enclosing walls with a south window, a floor, a sofa with three loose cushions, a movable wooden nightstand/cabinet with a pull-out drawer, a retro TV with two adjustable dials, a rug, and assorted props. Mesh-based MJCF loaded via Newton's importer. The scene <include>s a Unitree G1 humanoid (expected at unitree_g1/g1.xml relative to this scene) at the spawn site; that robot model is NOT bundled in this export and must be supplied for the scene to compile.

robot.description: Unitree G1 humanoid pulled in via <include file='unitree_g1/g1.xml'>. The referenced file (MuJoCo Menagerie) is missing from this export; place the unitree_g1 model folder next to scene.xml so the include resolves. Note: this template has no locomotion controller for the G1, so without added control it loads as inert geometry.

south_wall_window_frame_5.description: Window frame set into the south wall

south_win_glass_box_15.description: Glass pane of the south window

asset_0_0.description: Sofa/couch frame (static base for the loose cushions)

simple_wooden_purple_tv_1_articulation_i.description: Movable wooden nightstand/cabinet whose body can be repositioned and which contains a pull-out drawer

simple_wooden_purple_tv_grp_drawer_46.description: Pull-out drawer in the wooden nightstand/cabinet

asset_2_2.description: Round wooden side table next to the sofa. Made movable for pick-and-place tasks (freejoint + 3 kg inertial added on top of the original Gizmo static geometry).

asset_3_3.description: Wall-mounted decor near the top of the north wall

braided_oval_rug_4_rigid_body.description: Braided oval rug lying on the floor (rigid_body class, static)

asset_5_5.description: Movable decor object (~3.93 kg) resting on the cabinet

asset_6_6.description: Movable retro TV/console with two adjustable dials

asset_6_grp_dial_top_125.description: Top rotary dial on the retro TV

asset_6_grp_dial_bot_129.description: Bottom rotary dial on the retro TV

spawn_Robot_Spawn.description: Marked robot spawn location (cylinder marker); no robot is instantiated in this scene

drawer.description: State of the nightstand drawer slide joint 'j_joint_drawer_prismatic_47'

dial_top.description: State of the TV's top dial hinge joint 'j_joint_dial_top_126'

dial_bottom.description: State of the TV's bottom dial hinge joint 'j_joint_dial_bottom_130'

body_frames.description: Per-body pose/velocity frame sensors for the movable objects

sensors.usage: Use get_object_state(object_name=...) and get_joint_state(joint_name=...) to read these; sensor names above mirror the <sensor> block in scene.xml.

open_drawer.description: Pull the nightstand drawer open (slide toward -0.3 m)

arrange_cushions.description: Reposition the three loose sofa cushions

move_side_table_to_corner.description: Pick up the round side table and move it into the south-west corner of the room (within 0.6 m of [-2.0, -2.0]). Demonstrated kinematically by scripts/loco_manip_g1.py.
